description: Create a Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\legal_glossary\ that dynamically loads a legal glossary from C:\workspace\data\legal_glossary.json. The module must consist of glossary.py and glossary.talon. In glossary.py, register a list named user.legal_term (description: "Law enforcement glossary") where the keys are lowercase spoken forms and the values are the exact uppercase keys from the JSON. Implement a custom action user.notify_legal_definition(term_key: str) that retrieves the definition from the JSON and displays it via actions.app.notify(), using the term key as the title and the definition as the body. In glossary.talon, implement the voice command "define term {user.legal_term}:" to call the custom action. Ensure all files are saved to allow for Talon hot-reloading.
